# programs.bacon

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.bacon`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.bacon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bacon, a background rust code checker. |
| `programs.bacon.package` | `null or package` | The bacon package to use. |
| `programs.bacon.settings` | `TOML value` | Bacon configuration written to either Library/Application Support/org.dystroy.bacon/prefs.toml (darwin) or $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/bacon/prefs.toml . For available settings see https://dystroy.org/bacon/#global-preferences . |
